---
title: "Elizabeth Heathcote"
---

## Elizabeth Heathcote

**Dates:** (1773-23 March 1855)

**Maiden name:** (Bigg)

### Description

mother of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

Friend of Jane Austen as Elizabeth Bigg, she married (1798) the Rev. William Heathcote (1772-1802).

### Letters

- Letter from <b>Error! Bookmark not defined</b>.OtterbournMarch 31st [1855]
- Letter from March 29th [1855]
- Letter from Friday [23 March 1855]
- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Oct 28th 1844
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
